description_long: This is a bright orange and brown baseball cap with a rounded, domed crown and a wide, slightly curved brim. The front of the cap features a prominent patch with a stylized red truck or construction vehicle on a tan background, adding a playful and distinctive touch. The crown has a small circular button at the top, typical of classic baseball cap designs. The brim is a darker brown, contrasting with the orange crown, and extends forward to provide shade. The cap appears to be made of fabric, likely cotton or polyester, with a soft, flexible structure. The interior is hollow, designed to fit comfortably on a person's head.
description: A bright orange and brown baseball cap with a domed crown, wide curved brim, and a front patch featuring a red truck logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange crown, brown brim, and the truck logo patch prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cap's domed profile and the length of the brown brim extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted orange crown with no visible logo or fastener.
description_view_3: Angled top view showing the circular button on the crown and the curvature of the brim.
